category_sources: source_facts.description says Wireshark is a network analyzer and capture tool; official Wireshark site calls it a network analyzer.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is wireshark; source_facts.homepage is the official Wireshark website.
docs_sources: Official Wireshark docs page links user and developer documentation; official Developer's Guide is hosted under wireshark.org/docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Wireshark Develop page identifies gitlab.com/wireshark/wireshark as the code repository and review system.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies network analysis and capture; source_facts.executables includes tshark, dumpcap, mergecap, and related CLI tools.
